creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
When doing a make index i get no index file created and the following output near the end:

-- describe.x11-clocks ---
--- describe.x11-drivers ---
--- describe.x11-fm ---
--- describe.x11-fonts ---
--- describe.x11-servers ---
--- describe.x11-themes ---
--- describe.x11-toolkits ---
--- describe.x11-wm ---
make_index: /usr/ports/games/linux-uplink-demo: no entry for /usr/ports/audio/linux-c7-mikmod
 Done.


Does anyone know how to fix make index?
